data.title: New Optimizely Research Suggests AI's Not Helping Marketers Regain Their Creativity
data.description: A recent survey conducted among marketing leaders uncovered a concerning trend known as the "passion-pressure paradox." It was observed that despite the time-saving benefits of artificial intelligence (AI), it did not effectively restore creative and strategic work in the industry. This survey was conducted by Optimizely, a prominent provider of digital experience platforms (DXP). The research findings were released in New York on April 29, 2026 via a statement issued by PRNewswire. The study sheds light on the challenges faced by marketing professionals, with key numbers indicating the impact of AI on their workflow and the need to balance efficiency with creativity.

data.title: Perrigo Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Dublin on April 29, 2026, Perrigo Company plc, a prominent global consumer products provider, revealed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly dividend of $0.29 per share, equivalent to $1.16 per share annually.

data.title: Tweddle Group Receives Top Supplier Rating from Toyota (TMNA)
data.description: A leading provider of product service and support information, Tweddle Group, located in Clinton Township, Michigan, was recently awarded an "A" supplier grade by Toyota (TMNA) for its exceptional performance. The analysis highlighted their high-quality output and punctual delivery of over 2 million parts. This recognition underscores Tweddle Group's commitment to excellence and reliability in their services. This achievement signifies the company's dedication to meeting the stringent standards set by Toyota, showcasing their competence and efficiency in handling large-scale projects.

data.title: NanoMosaic to Showcase the FDA/CBER AMT Designated Analytics Platform at ASGCT 2026
data.description: In the field of gene therapy, the Tessie™ system represents a significant advancement by allowing the simultaneous quantitation of capsid and transgene on a single chip in the same run. This cutting-edge technology supports precise characterization of full, partial, and empty capsids, as well as facilitating potency assessment and regulatory-relevant quality control for Adeno-Associated Virus (AAV) vectors. Located in Boston, this innovation opens up new possibilities for researchers and professionals in the gene therapy sector.

data.title: POLYN Technology Announces Tapeout of Automotive Chip
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, POLYN achieved a significant milestone with its VibroSense chip, designed to improve the accuracy of tire-road grip monitoring. This advancement is crucial for enhancing safety and driving efficiency.

data.title: Teva Surges As Its New Growth Strategy Hits A Key Inflection Point
data.description: The stock of Teva experienced a significant increase on Wednesday morning following a positive first-quarter report. The company's key brands surpassed generic products in the U.S., contributing to the stock surge. This growth is a result of Teva's effective implementation of a new growth strategy, marking a crucial turning point for the company.

data.title: Meta Earnings Preview: AI 'Monetization Story' Faces Biggest Test Yet
data.description: Investors on Wall Street are anticipating Meta to report its highest sales growth in five years. The upcoming earnings report will serve as a significant test for Meta's artificial intelligence "monetization story." The company's financial performance will be closely watched as analysts project a substantial increase in revenue compared to previous years. This growth represents a significant opportunity for Meta to showcase the effectiveness of its AI strategies to drive profitability.

data.title: AbbVie Hikes Earnings Outlook As Immunology Duo Outperforms
data.description: AbbVie's stock saw a rise in early trading on Wednesday due to stronger-than-anticipated sales of Skyrizi and Rinvoq. This led to an increase in their earnings guidance. The company's immunology duo outperformed, resulting in a positive outlook for AbbVie's profitability.

data.title: XTL Biopharmaceuticals to Acquire Psyga Bio, Establishing a Leading Psychedelic Biotechnology Platform with Advanced Clinical Pipeline, Licensed GMP Manufacturing and Proprietary Psilocybin Technologies
data.description: A recent transaction has established XTL as a leading player in the fast-growing global psychedelic therapeutics market. The company has gained significant traction in this sector, especially in the United States where regulatory developments have been favorable. This move positions XTL to capitalize on the expanding market, which is projected to reach a value of $7.6 billion by 2027.

data.title: Qualcomm Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: QUALCOMM Incorporated is set to announce its second-quarter earnings on April 29. Analysts are predicting earnings of $2.56 per share, a decrease from $2.85 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $10.58 billion, lower than the $10.84 billion reported last year. The company, based in San Diego, California, is said to be collaborating with OpenAI on developing smartphone processors. Closing at $150.00 on Tuesday, Qualcomm's shares experienced a 0.2% drop. For more details and analyst ratings, readers can visit Benzinga's website.

data.title: Lantern Pharma’s predictBBB.ai Evolves Into a Real-Time Large Quantitative Model (LQM) for Precision Molecular Intelligence — Comprehensive Small Molecule Characterization & Development Analytics Available as a Web Service to Drug Developers Globally
data.description: In Dallas, Lantern Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ: LTRN) unveiled the enhancement of predictBBB.ai into a Large Quantitative Model (LQM), powered by their RADR® AI platform. This development allows global access to a real-time quantitative intelligence engine through a single browser interface. The innovation enables pharmaceutical scientists and medicinal chemists to leverage this resource in their research and drug development efforts. This expansion marks a significant milestone in advancing precision oncology, with the tool now available worldwide.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Bill Ackman Raises $5 Billion in Pershing Square IPO
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issues a daily advisory from the trading floor before the market opens. As of April 29, 2026, investors can access the NYSE's pre-market update for insights on market trends. This update offers valuable information to traders before the market commences and aims to provide a comprehensive analysis of the market conditions anticipated for the day. It serves as a resource for those looking to make informed decisions based on the latest data.

data.title: Parks Associates: West Leads US Regions in Energy Program Adoption, With Time-Of-Use (TOU) Rates Driving Participation
data.description: A recent study conducted by Parks Associates in Plano, Texas, on Grid-Ready Homes revealed significant regional differences in program adoption rates across the United States. The study, titled "Home Energy Insights, Assets, & Bundles," showcased limited overall participation among households in energy programs. The research, conducted in April 2026, sheds light on the need to address the disparities in uptake to ensure widespread implementation.

data.title: Live Webcast Public Auction Set for Dynaflex Products' Closing Commerce, California Tube Bending & Exhaust Manufacturing Facility, as Company Reorganizes
data.description: ThreeSixty Asset Advisors, CA Global Partners, and Fram Fram will be collaborating to auction off a range of large-diameter tube bending, forming, and fabrication equipment, with diameters between 3 inches and 10.75 inches. The auction is set for May 12, 2026. Interested parties can engage in pre-bidding starting as of now. The event is scheduled to take place in COMMERCE, California, and the announcement was made on April 29, 2026. The equipment up for sale is likely to attract significant attention given its specialized nature and the sizes available.

data.title: Coco Robotics Unveils Largest Multi-Brand Campaign on Autonomous Miami Delivery Fleet Across F1 Window
data.description: In Miami, over 100 robots operating under Coco's fleet are now adorned with brand wraps, transforming routine autonomous deliveries into a widespread out-of-home marketing avenue during a significant cultural event. This development was announced on April 29, 2026, marking Coco Robotics as the leading provider of urban robot delivery services worldwide.
